# Version 4.151.0
> **Performance and Skia m151** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 upgrades to Skia m151 and delivers allocation-free text shaping improvements. This preview introduces a wave of performance optimizations across HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper, eliminating per-call heap allocations and using zero-copy spans. It also adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor, fixes a native resource leak in SKImage, and brings WASM support for .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upgraded to Skia milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to chrome/m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements and stability fixes backported across three sync passes. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **Skia submodule WASM build fix** — A redefinition of SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM in the Skia submodule was dropped, resolving a build-time warning on WASM targets. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **Allocation-free text shaping hot paths** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 now uses pooled UTF-8 encoding to avoid heap allocation per call, Tag.Parse eliminates a char[4] allocation, and SKShaper reads glyph results via zero-copy spans. SKFourByteTag.Parse receives the same char[4] allocation fix. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse gain ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads, removing unnecessary string allocations when parsing hex color strings in hot paths. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions unnecessary unsafe modifier removed** — The unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, cleaning up the public API surface without any behavioral change. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native handle on every call; the handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **CPU raster regression resolved** — Restoring SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT corrects a CPU raster pipeline regression introduced when syncing to the m151 engine. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## Platform

- **WASM support for .NET 11 via Emscripten 5** — New Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are included, enabling SkiaSharp on WASM targets building against .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 eliminates per-call heap allocations in Buffer.AddUtf8 and Tag.Parse, and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries for .NET 11.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | WASM Emscripten 5 static library support for .NET 11, the Skia submodule drop of the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition, and a cross-backend visual regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered the full wave of allocation-free text shaping improvements across HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper, SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads, the GRContextOptions cleanup, the SKImage resource leak fix, and additional m151 upstream syncs.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 delivered the initial Skia m151 engine upgrade, the first upstream bug-fix sync, and the Skia submodule WASM build fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
